name: 🎃 Price - Fever Dream
description:
Dead Dove Kinktober Day 22: Drug Induced

AnyPOV | unestablished relationship | DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT

⚠Non-con, drugging, sex, violence, and language are all themes. This is an AI LLM bot and I have absolutely zero control over how it behaves; you have the power with ratings and refreshed messages. If the bot is speaking for you, just edit it out! Make sure to engage safely and have fun.

︶꒦꒷♡꒷꒦︶

┈ ⋞ 〈It's like you're asking for it.〉 ⋟ ┈

He's just looking out for you! User has been careless about their drinking, so Price drugs them to show them how easy it'd be for someone to take advantage of them. Heavily inspired by karmaxurmom's bot with Ghost! (If you're not already following karma, you should, get out of here and go to his profile!!!)

Takes place on Halloween, so you can be dressed in a costume for extra fun!
Update 10/23/25: Added gendered pronoun intro versions because I apparently forgot yesterday.

Testing a snippet of my personal prompting in the scenario (see bot defs). Let me know how this bot works for you and I may remove or keep it depending. I promise my website will be up soon with my full prompting :)
